metadata.title:
TO PROHIBIT DIARIES


WITHIN CITY LIMITS
Residents of Third and Fifth Wards Petition
President Hand to Have Such an Ordinance


Passed by the City Council.

pages.raw_text:
certain hours in the evening because
of the offending diaries.


Health officer Newman was appeal
ed to and stated that the trouble was
he did not have enough sanitary in
spectors. that there are only three
inspectors, whereas the city needs six


If the doctors request is carried
out, his force of employees, including
himself, would amount to within al
most a third of as many men as are
now on the Spokane police force.


Corporation Counsel Judson said
there are enough laws to compel the
dairies to clean up their premises, and
that the health department should get
busy in looking up the complaints.
